name: The Hermit (Isolation)
description: Units with the Isolation tag are 30% more likely to appear. Your first attack each combat deals +20% damage if the target has no adjacent allies.
notes: The damage bonus needs to inspect the attack BEFORE it lands and return a bigger number, which a plain EventBus trigger can't do -- see custom_tarot_handlers.gd, registered under custom_id 'the_hermit_isolation'.
